payload.answer: I can’t reliably retrieve “everything about Sam from Goldman” because I don’t have enough information to identify which Sam you mean, and there are no candidate memory records available to confirm details. Please provide at least one additional identifier (e.g., Sam’s last name, role/title at Goldman, approximate dates, team/office, or any other distinctive detail) so I can look up the correct person and report what I know.
payload.conflict_classification: Ambiguous entity reference; insufficient context to resolve identity; no recall evidence available to assess contradictions.
payload.decision: Cannot confidently recall a specific Sam associated with Goldman; request clarifying details before retrieving or asserting any facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to “Sam” and “Goldman” but provides insufficient identifiers (e.g., full name, role, time period, location) to uniquely match an entity in memory, and no relevant memory cards are available to verify claims.

details: No memory cards were found or presented that match the query constraints.

repair_options: Provide Sam’s full name (including last name).
Provide Sam’s Goldman role/title (e.g., analyst, associate, managing director).
